1.quote: It is usually more or less easy to analyze others and classify them according to personality. But the most important analysis is that of yourself.
1.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

2.quote: Introspection is a mirror in which to see recesses of your mind that otherwise would not be accessible to you.
2.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

3.quote: Look within. Self-analysis is the greatest art of progress.
3.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

4.quote: Know what you are and then you can work to become what you ought to be.
4.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

5.quote: The season of failure is the best time for sowing the seeds of success.
5.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

6.quote: The power of unfulfilled desires is the root of all man's slavery.
6.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

7.quote: Examine yourself. Ask: 'Am I progressing spiritually? Am I giving more love and understanding to those around me?'
7.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

8.quote: Self-control is strength. Right thought is mastery. Calmness is power.
8.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

9.quote: Be master of yourself. Do not let the senses rule you; let the soul guide every thought and action.
9.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

10.quote: A man of self-control, being freed from all the bondage of sense pleasures, reaches supreme peace.
10.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

11.quote: Self-control does not mean self-torture. Learn to wisely control the senses through reason and discrimination.
11.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

12.quote: The mind is restless, turbulent, obstinate, and very strong; but it can be controlled through regular practice and detachment.
12.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

13.quote: You must not let your life run in the ordinary way; do something that nobody else has done, something that will dazzle the world.
13.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

14.quote: Do not depend on others to make you happy; find the spring of joy within yourself.
14.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

15.quote: The power of concentration is the only key to the treasure-house of knowledge.
15.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

16.quote: Success is hastened or delayed by one's habits. It is not your passing inspirations or brilliant ideas so much as your everyday mental habits that control your life.
16.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

17.quote: Attention is the needle that forms the grooves of mental good or ill. Concentration is the ability to direct attention where you will.
17.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

18.quote: Calm the mind, that without distortion it may mirror Omnipresence.
18.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

19.quote: Where there is the greatest concentration of energy, there is the greatest power.
19.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

20.quote: Be as simple as you can be; you will be astonished to see how uncomplicated and happy your life can become.
20.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

21.quote: Learn to be calm and you will always be happy.
21.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

22.quote: The love of God is the only reality; all else is dreaming.
22.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

23.quote: Have devotion and faith in God, whether or not His hand is visible in the pattern of events.
23.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

24.quote: The devotee who worships God with deepest love is nearest to God.
24.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

25.quote: Give everything to God, and you shall receive everything from God.
25.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

26.quote: In the temple of silence, in the temple of peace, I will meet Thee, I will touch Thee, I will love Thee.
26.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

27.quote: Through love and devotion, the finite becomes infinite, the temporal becomes eternal.
27.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

28.quote: Devotion is not emotion; it is the supreme love that comes from the fountain of the soul.
28.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

29.quote: Faith in God can produce any miracle except one — it cannot fail.
29.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

30.quote: So long as we believe in our heart of hearts that our capacity is limited and we grow anxious and unhappy, we are lacking in faith.
30.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

31.quote: Faith is not blind belief. True faith is the experience of wisdom.
31.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

1.quote: Everything in future will improve if you are making a spiritual effort now.
1.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

2.quote: Have unshakable faith that God's power is behind every righteous initiative.
2.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

3.quote: Faith is the direct perception of truth — it comes from intuition.
3.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

4.quote: Stand unshaken amidst the crash of breaking worlds.
4.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

5.quote: Meditation is the pathway to the kingdom of God within.
5.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

6.quote: The more you meditate, the more you will feel the joy and peace of God's presence.
6.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

7.quote: In meditation, the soul finds its true home.
7.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

8.quote: Meditate more and more deeply, until calmness and joy become second nature to you.
8.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

9.quote: Meditation is not a way of making your mind quiet. It's a way of entering into the quiet that is already there.
9.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

10.quote: The soul loves to meditate, for in contact with the Spirit lies its greatest joy.
10.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

11.quote: If you practice meditation faithfully, the day will come when you will see the full blaze of God's light.
11.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

12.quote: True humility is the consciousness of God's greatness and our own nothingness apart from Him.
12.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

13.quote: Be humble, be harmless, have no pretension, be upright, forbearing.
13.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

14.quote: Humility comes from understanding that God alone is the Doer.
14.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

15.quote: It is not selfish to be happy. It is your highest duty to be happy. You make others happy only when you are happy.
15.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

16.quote: Humility is not weakness; it is the strength of the wise.
16.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

17.quote: In humility lies the greatest freedom, for the ego is the heaviest burden.
17.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

18.quote: When you realize God, you become humble naturally.
18.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

19.quote: Have patience. In time, even an egg will walk.
19.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

20.quote: Seeds of past karma cannot germinate if they are roasted in the fires of divine wisdom.
20.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

21.quote: Be patient. Impatience is a thief of peace.
21.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

22.quote: The wave does not have to worry about the ocean's depth; its power lies in the ocean itself.
22.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

23.quote: Patience is a divine virtue. Nothing happens before its time.
23.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

24.quote: God's delays are not God's denials. Be patient in all things.
24.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

25.quote: Good habits developed in the past give steady results now; be patient with new ones.
25.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

26.quote: Live each moment completely and the future will take care of itself. Fully enjoy the wonder and beauty of each moment.
26.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

27.quote: Humbleness is the manifestation of an understanding heart, and sets an example of greatness for others to follow.
27.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

28.quote: The rains of God's mercy cannot gather on mountaintops of pride, but flow easily into valleys of humbleness.
28.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

29.quote: Whatever comes, face it on your feet. That is the way of the warrior.
29.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

1.quote: When you are steadfast in the principles of the guru-disciple relationship, the spiritual path becomes very easy. You cannot then go astray. No matter how delusion tries to pull you away, the master who has experienced God knows your trouble and will help you to steady yourself on the path again. That is what the guru does for you if you are in tune with him.
1.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

2.quote: Students are those who follow the master more or less superficially according to their pick-and-choose inclination. But the disciple is one who accepts wholly, with open heart and mind. He does not have to be coaxed, but follows through his own will and determination. He remains steadfast, dedicated, and devoted to the end, until he has found freedom in God.
2.author: Paramahansa Yogananda
2.source: The Second Coming of Christ: The Resurrection of the Christ Within You

3.quote: The Masters, the Good Shepherds of this world, come down from their high places and give their lives to searching for disciples who are lost in the darkness. They find them in desolate and dangerous places, arouse them, lift them to a divine shoulder, and bear them with rejoicing to a safe place in the fold. They feed them with celestial food and give them living water to drink, of which, if a man eat and drink, he shall live forever. They give them power to become the sons of God. They give their own lives, to the last ounce of flesh and the last drop of blood, for the redemption of the sheep who know their voice.
3.author: Sri Gyanamata
3.source: God Alone: The Life and Letters of a Saint

4.quote: It is the duty of the guru and the disciple to be loyal to each other, not only in one life, but for many lives if these are necessary to reach God. Those who are one hundred percent loyal to a guru can be sure of ultimate liberation and ascension. One may have many teachers, but only one guru, who remains as one's guru even in many different lives, until the disciple reaches the final goal of emancipation in God. You must remember this, once that relationship is formed.
4.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

5.quote: The spiritual training you {Paramahansa Yogananda} have given me has been, and is, perfect. The guru cannot be judged, if he is to be judged at all, by the rules that apply to a friendship between equals. I have always known this.
5.author: Sri Gyanamata
5.source: God Alone: The Life and Letters of a Saint

6.quote: The friendship that exists between guru and disciple is eternal. There is complete surrender, there is no compulsion, when a disciple accepts the guru's training.
6.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

7.quote: Remain calm, serene, always in command of yourself. You will then find out how easy it is to get along.
7.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

8.quote: Swami Sri Yukteswar to his disciple Paramahansa Yogananda: "I will be your friend from now to Eternity, no matter whether you are on the lowest mental plane or on the highest plane of wisdom. I will be your friend even if you should err, for then you will need my friendship more than at any other time."
8.author: Swami Sri Yukteswar

9.quote: The greatest courage is to face your own fears and overcome them with God's help.
9.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

10.quote: Let nothing disturb your inner peace. Face life with courage born of spiritual strength.
10.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

11.quote: The love you express to others is really the love of God flowing through you.
11.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

12.quote: Love is the light that dissolves all walls between souls.
12.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

13.quote: When love beckons to you, follow Him, for His ways are hard and steep.
13.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

14.quote: Practice love with every soul, through words, thoughts, and actions.
14.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

15.quote: The highest form of love is to see God in every human being.
15.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

16.quote: True love is unconditional. It asks nothing and gives everything.
16.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

17.quote: Love is the greatest power on earth. It conquers all things.
17.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

18.quote: Wisdom is knowing what is right; virtue is doing what is right.
18.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

19.quote: Knowledge of the divine removes the veil of ignorance.
19.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

20.quote: Man's wisdom is nothing compared to the infinite wisdom of God.
20.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

21.quote: Good judgment comes from experience, and experience comes from bad judgment.
21.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

22.quote: Through wisdom, even the most impossible situation can be resolved.
22.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

23.quote: True wisdom is to see the divine plan working through all things.
23.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

24.quote: Seek wisdom above all else, for it is the lamp that lights the way.
24.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

25.quote: When you find peace within yourself, you become the kind of person who can live at peace with others.
25.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

26.quote: Peace is the altar of God, the condition in which happiness exists.
26.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

27.quote: Be still and know that I am God. In the stillness of the soul, divine peace is found.
27.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

28.quote: Let your life lightly dance on the edges of time, like dew on the tip of a leaf.
28.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

29.quote: True peace comes not from the absence of conflict, but from the ability to cope with it.
29.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

30.quote: The peace that you feel in meditation is the peace of God.
30.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

31.quote: In inner peace you will find the answer to every question.
31.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

1.quote: If you possess happiness you possess everything; to be happy is to be in tune with God.
1.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

2.quote: God is joy. In order to find God, find joy first.
2.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

3.quote: Happiness depends on conditions being perceived as positive; joy on finding God within.
3.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

4.quote: The joy of God is boundless, eternal, ever new. It is the treasure of all treasures.
4.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

5.quote: Live joyfully. Joy is not a luxury; it is a necessity.
5.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

6.quote: Don't depend on death to liberate you from your imperfections. You are quite free to do so at any time.
6.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

7.quote: Seek joy within. It is always there, awaiting discovery.
7.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

8.quote: Be a true friend to all. Those who are your friends, love them for the good you can do for them.
8.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

9.quote: The best way to find yourself is to lose yourself in the service of others.
9.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

10.quote: Service to humanity is the best work of life.
10.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

11.quote: Help others. Give something of yourself to those who come to you.
11.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

12.quote: Making others happy through kindness of speech and sincerity of right advice is a sign of true greatness.
12.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

13.quote: True service is selfless. It expects nothing in return.
13.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

14.quote: Let your life be a living expression of the love and service of God.
14.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

15.quote: Truth is exact correspondence with reality.
15.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

16.quote: Express your truth quietly and clearly; and listen to others, even the dull and ignorant, they too have their story.
16.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

17.quote: When you speak the truth, you speak with God's voice.
17.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

18.quote: Truthfulness is the very foundation of spiritual life.
18.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

19.quote: Live in truth and truth will live in you.
19.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

20.quote: The honest person radiates a magnetism that attracts divine blessings.
20.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

21.quote: Truth never damages a cause that is just.
21.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

22.quote: Be as simple as you can be; you will be astonished to see how uncomplicated and happy your life can become.
22.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

23.quote: In simplicity lies wisdom. The greatest truths are the simplest.
23.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

24.quote: Material simplicity opens the door to spiritual richness.
24.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

25.quote: Don't make life complicated. Return to the simple joys of existence.
25.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

27.quote: Live simply so that others may simply live.
27.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

28.quote: A simple heart and a clear mind are the gifts of a spiritual life.
28.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

29.quote: Self-discipline is the magic power that makes you virtually unstoppable.
29.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

30.quote: The undisciplined mind leads to suffering; the disciplined mind leads to happiness.
30.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

2.quote: Control your thoughts. Every thought is a seed; plant only the finest.
2.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

3.quote: Discipline means to learn from one who knows.
3.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

4.quote: The greatest victory is victory over oneself.
4.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

5.quote: Self-discipline is not punishment; it is the training of the soul.
5.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

6.quote: Sincerity is the soul virtue. Be sincere in your spiritual efforts.
6.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

7.quote: A sincere heart will always find its way to God.
7.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

8.quote: Sincerity of effort attracts divine grace.
8.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

9.quote: The key to success in every field is sincerity of purpose.
9.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

10.quote: Be honest with yourself and with God. Sincerity opens all doors.
10.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

11.quote: God responds to the sincerity of the devotee, not to outward show.
11.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

12.quote: True sincerity is the hallmark of spiritual advancement.
12.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

13.quote: Kindness is the golden chain by which society is bound together.
13.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

14.quote: A kind word is like a spring day — it refreshes all around it.
14.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

15.quote: Show kindness to all. Each soul is fighting its own battle.
15.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

16.quote: In kindness, you reflect the nature of God.
16.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

17.quote: The smallest act of kindness is worth more than the grandest intention.
17.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

18.quote: Be kind to all creatures; this is the true religion.
18.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

19.quote: Kindness is the language which the deaf can hear and the blind can see.
19.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

20.quote: Will power is the dynamo of all accomplishment.
20.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

21.quote: Your will is powerful enough to accomplish anything you set your mind to.
21.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

22.quote: Will is the instrument of the image of God within you.
22.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

23.quote: A strong will can conquer any obstacle.
23.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

24.quote: Through will power, diseases of body and mind can be overcome.
24.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

25.quote: You can accomplish anything if you have strong will power and God's grace.
25.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

26.quote: Use your will to strengthen your connection with the Divine.
26.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

27.quote: When you have found inner peace, you are in contact with the inexhaustible source of true joy.
27.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

28.quote: Inner peace is the most valuable treasure — once achieved, nothing can take it away.
28.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

29.quote: The cultivation of inner peace is the greatest gift you can give the world.
29.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

30.quote: Peace is found not in what surrounds you, but in what lies within.
30.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

31.quote: Be calm. Let God work through you in this imperfect world.
31.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

1.quote: Inner peace begins the moment you choose not to allow another person or event to control your emotions.
1.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

2.quote: The secret of inner peace is letting go of what you cannot control.
2.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

3.quote: Progress comes through practice. Make a steady effort to improve.
3.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

4.quote: Every bit of spiritual effort you make leads you closer to God.
4.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

5.quote: Spiritual progress is measured by the depth of your peace and the breadth of your love.
5.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

6.quote: Don't be discouraged by slow progress. Even a turtle eventually reaches its goal.
6.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

7.quote: True spiritual progress is the gradual awakening of divine consciousness.
7.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

8.quote: Every step forward, no matter how small, brings you closer to the infinite.
8.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

9.quote: Spiritual growth is not measured by what you know, but by what you practice.
9.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

10.quote: Divine love is without condition, without boundary, without change.
10.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

11.quote: The love that flows from God is the most powerful force in the universe.
11.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

12.quote: When you feel God's love, you know that everything is going to be all right.
12.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

13.quote: Divine love is the magnet that draws all souls back to God.
13.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

14.quote: Open your heart to receive God's unconditional love.
14.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

15.quote: The love of God is the only reality. All else is illusion.
15.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

16.quote: In divine love, all fears dissolve and all questions are answered.
16.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

17.quote: Right action is the expression of wisdom in everyday life.
17.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

18.quote: Do the right thing always. Let your conscience be your guide.
18.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

19.quote: The fruit of right action is peace; the harvest of wrong action is suffering.
19.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

20.quote: Act with integrity, and the universe will support your endeavors.
20.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

21.quote: Right action requires right thinking and right attitude.
21.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

22.quote: When in doubt, choose the path of kindness and truth.
22.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

23.quote: Every action has a consequence. Choose your actions wisely.
23.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

24.quote: A saint is a sinner who never gave up.
24.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

25.quote: When you refuse to give up, God will find a way to help you.
25.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

26.quote: Perseverance is the hallmark of every great soul.
26.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

27.quote: Never give up! Failure and rejection are only the first steps to success.
27.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

28.quote: Persist in your efforts. The rewards of perseverance are immeasurable.
28.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

29.quote: The greatest glory in living lies not in never falling, but in rising every time we fall.
29.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

30.quote: Continue your spiritual efforts with unflagging determination.
30.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

1.quote: To forgive is the highest, most beautiful form of love.
1.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

2.quote: Forgiveness is the fragrance that the violet sheds on the heel that has crushed it.
2.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

3.quote: Let go of resentment. Forgiveness sets the prisoner free — and that prisoner is you.
3.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

4.quote: Holding onto anger is like drinking poison and expecting the other person to die.
4.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

5.quote: True forgiveness means to release all claims against another.
5.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

6.quote: Forgive others not because they deserve forgiveness, but because you deserve peace.
6.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

7.quote: When you forgive, you heal; when you let go, you grow.
7.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

8.quote: Compassion is the keen awareness of the interdependence of all things.
8.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

9.quote: If you want others to be happy, practice compassion.
9.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

10.quote: Show compassion to all beings — this is the highest religion.
10.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

11.quote: True compassion is not just feeling; it is acting to relieve suffering.
11.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

12.quote: Compassion and love are the greatest powers in the universe.
12.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

13.quote: See the suffering of others as your own, and act to help.
13.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

14.quote: The heart of compassion knows no boundaries of race, religion, or creed.
14.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

15.quote: Self-realization is the knowing in body, mind, and soul that we are one with the omnipresence of God.
15.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

16.quote: The purpose of life is the realization of the Self — the soul.
16.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

17.quote: When you realize your true nature, all fear and sorrow disappear.
17.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

18.quote: Self-realization is not something to be gained; it is something to be recognized.
18.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

19.quote: The greatest discovery is the discovery of one's own divine nature.
19.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

20.quote: In self-realization, you find the answer to every question life poses.
20.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

21.quote: Know thyself, and thou shalt know the universe and God.
21.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

22.quote: Attunement with God is the greatest achievement of human life.
22.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

23.quote: Be in tune with the Infinite. Let God's will guide your actions.
23.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

24.quote: Through attunement with the cosmic consciousness, all wisdom flows.
24.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

25.quote: Attunement means alignment of your will with God's will.
25.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

26.quote: When you are in tune with God, everything falls into place.
26.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

27.quote: The deepest attunement comes in the silence of meditation.
27.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

28.quote: Attune yourself to the divine vibration that underlies all creation.
28.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

29.quote: Live in harmony with all — this is the way of the wise.
29.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

30.quote: Harmony is the natural state of the soul. Restore it through meditation.
30.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

31.quote: When you are in harmony with yourself, you are in harmony with the world.
31.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

1.quote: The universe operates in perfect harmony. Align yourself with its laws.
1.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

2.quote: Harmony in relationships comes from harmony within.
2.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

3.quote: Seek first the harmony of the soul, and all outer harmony will follow.
3.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

4.quote: Life is a symphony — play your part in harmony with the whole.
4.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

5.quote: God-contact is not a mere concept; it is the most tangible reality.
5.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

6.quote: The purpose of meditation is to make contact with God.
6.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

7.quote: When you experience God-contact, all doubts disappear.
7.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

8.quote: God is not far away. He is the nearest of the near, the dearest of the dear.
8.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

9.quote: Through deep meditation, you can experience direct contact with God.
9.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

10.quote: God-contact transforms every aspect of your life.
10.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

11.quote: The greatest joy is to feel God's presence in your heart.
11.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

12.quote: Do not be afraid. Behind this ever-changing world, God is changeless.
12.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

13.quote: Fear is the enemy of progress. Replace fear with faith.
13.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

14.quote: Courage is not the absence of fear; it is acting in spite of it.
14.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

15.quote: When you know that God is with you, what is there to fear?
15.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

16.quote: Fear comes from uncertainty. Faith in God removes all uncertainty.
16.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

17.quote: Face your fears boldly, for they are shadows that dissolve in the light of truth.
17.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

18.quote: The antidote to fear is not courage, but love.
18.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

19.quote: Change your thoughts and you change your world.
19.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

20.quote: Positive thoughts are the seeds of positive actions.
20.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

21.quote: The mind is everything. What you think, you become.
21.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

22.quote: Fill your mind with thoughts of God, and negativity cannot enter.
22.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

23.quote: A positive mental attitude can overcome any obstacle.
23.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

24.quote: Think of good things. Let optimism be your daily companion.
24.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

25.quote: Your thoughts create your reality. Choose them wisely.
25.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

26.quote: The body is the temple of the soul. Keep it pure and healthy.
26.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

27.quote: Health is not merely the absence of disease; it is a state of complete well-being.
27.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

28.quote: The mind has great influence over the body. Use it to heal.
28.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

29.quote: Right living, right thinking, and meditation are the foundations of good health.
29.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

30.quote: God's healing power flows through every cell of your body.
30.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

31.quote: Take care of your body with the same devotion you show to your soul.
31.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

1.quote: Health of body and mind is essential for spiritual progress.
1.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

2.quote: The universe is filled with abundance. Open your heart to receive it.
2.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

3.quote: True abundance comes from within — from the riches of the soul.
3.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

4.quote: God's supply is infinite. There is enough for everyone.
4.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

5.quote: Abundance is not something we acquire. It is something we tune into.
5.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

6.quote: Seek first the kingdom of God, and all these things shall be added unto you.
6.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

7.quote: The secret of abundance is gratitude for what you already have.
7.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

8.quote: When you give generously, abundance flows back to you.
8.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

9.quote: Intuition is the soul's power of knowing God.
9.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

10.quote: Trust your intuition. It is the voice of the soul speaking to the mind.
10.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

11.quote: Develop your intuition through meditation and inner stillness.
11.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

12.quote: Intuition is the direct perception of truth — it never errs.
12.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

13.quote: The greatest decisions in life should be guided by intuition, not mere reason.
13.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

14.quote: In the silence of meditation, intuitive wisdom awakens.
14.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

15.quote: Learn to listen to the still, small voice within.
15.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

16.quote: The creative power within you is unlimited.
16.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

17.quote: Creativity is the expression of God's infinite imagination through you.
17.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

18.quote: Use your creative gifts to serve others and glorify God.
18.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

19.quote: Every great creation begins with a single thought inspired by the Divine.
19.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

20.quote: The universe itself is God's greatest creative work.
20.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

21.quote: Creativity flows naturally when the mind is calm and receptive.
21.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

22.quote: Express your unique gifts — they are your contribution to the world.
22.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

23.quote: Your attitude determines your altitude in life.
23.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

24.quote: A right attitude turns obstacles into opportunities.
24.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

25.quote: Maintain a positive attitude in all circumstances — this is the sign of a spiritual person.
25.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

26.quote: The right attitude toward life's challenges reveals hidden blessings.
26.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

27.quote: Attitude is a choice. Choose optimism, choose faith, choose love.
27.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

28.quote: With the right attitude, every experience becomes a teacher.
28.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

29.quote: Face life with the attitude of a conqueror, not a victim.
29.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

30.quote: Be in this world, but not of it. Enjoy all things, but cling to nothing.
30.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

1.quote: Non-attachment does not mean indifference; it means freedom.
1.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

2.quote: Attachment is the great fabricator of illusions; reality can be attained only by someone who is detached.
2.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

3.quote: Hold everything loosely. Let God rearrange your life as He sees fit.
3.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

4.quote: True freedom comes from releasing attachment to outcomes.
4.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

5.quote: Non-attachment is the highest form of love — loving without conditions.
5.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

6.quote: Let go and let God. In surrender, you find true strength.
6.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

7.quote: He who endures to the end shall be saved.
7.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

8.quote: Endurance is the ability to face difficulties with strength and faith.
8.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

9.quote: The strongest trees grow in the strongest winds.
9.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

10.quote: Endurance is not just the ability to bear a hard thing, but to turn it into glory.
10.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

11.quote: Through endurance, the impossible becomes possible.
11.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

12.quote: Endure all things with patience and grace, knowing that God is with you.
12.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

13.quote: Endurance builds character, and character builds destiny.
13.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

14.quote: God's grace is always flowing. You need only open yourself to receive it.
14.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

15.quote: Grace is the helping hand of God that lifts us when we fall.
15.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

16.quote: By God's grace, the impossible becomes possible.
16.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

17.quote: Grace comes to those who are sincere in their efforts.
17.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

18.quote: When human effort ends, divine grace begins.
18.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

19.quote: The more you surrender to God, the more His grace flows into your life.
19.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

20.quote: Grace transforms the ordinary into the extraordinary.
20.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

21.quote: Good habits are your best friends; bad habits are your worst enemies.
21.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

22.quote: Every day in every way, I am getting better and better.
22.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

23.quote: The chains of habit are too light to be felt until they are too heavy to be broken.
23.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

24.quote: Replace bad habits with good ones through the power of will.
24.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

25.quote: Good habits formed at youth make all the difference.
25.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

26.quote: Cultivate the habit of meditation — it is the foundation of all other good habits.
26.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

27.quote: Success is the sum of small efforts repeated day in and day out.
27.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

28.quote: You are not a human being having a spiritual experience; you are a spiritual being having a human experience.
28.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

29.quote: The soul is ever free. It cannot be contained by any limitation.
29.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

30.quote: In soul consciousness, you transcend all earthly limitations.
30.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

31.quote: Awaken to the truth of your divine nature.
31.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

1.quote: The soul knows what the mind cannot comprehend.
1.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

2.quote: Your true identity is the soul — eternal, blissful, ever-free.
2.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

3.quote: In the awareness of the soul, all problems dissolve.
3.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

4.quote: Love all equally, as manifestations of the One God.
4.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

5.quote: Universal love embraces all beings without distinction.
5.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

6.quote: When you love all, you become one with the divine love.
6.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

7.quote: Expand your love beyond all boundaries — this is the mark of the spiritual aspirant.
7.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

8.quote: The same God dwells in all hearts. Love all as expressions of the Divine.
8.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

9.quote: Universal love is not a sentiment; it is the very nature of the soul.
9.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

10.quote: Let your love be as vast as the ocean, embracing all creation.
10.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

11.quote: Discrimination is the ability to distinguish between the real and the unreal.
11.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

12.quote: Use your God-given intelligence to discern truth from falsehood.
12.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

13.quote: True discrimination comes from the soul, not from the intellect alone.
13.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

14.quote: Discrimination is the compass that guides us on the spiritual path.
14.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

15.quote: Before acting, pause and discriminate between what is right and what is merely convenient.
15.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

16.quote: The wise use discrimination in all things.
16.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

17.quote: Discrimination is the sword that cuts through the bonds of ignorance.
17.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

18.quote: To serve others selflessly is to serve God.
18.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

19.quote: Selflessness is the highest expression of love.
19.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

20.quote: When you forget yourself in service to others, you find your true self.
20.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

21.quote: The greatest among you shall be your servant.
21.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

22.quote: Selflessness is not sacrifice; it is the natural state of the awakened soul.
22.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

23.quote: Let your actions be guided by love, not by self-interest.
23.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

24.quote: In selfless service, the ego dissolves and the soul shines forth.
24.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

25.quote: Aspire to the highest! Never settle for less than your divine potential.
25.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

26.quote: The aspiring soul rises above all obstacles.
26.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

27.quote: Your highest aspiration should be to know God.
27.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

28.quote: Never lose sight of your spiritual goals. They are the most important goals of life.
28.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

29.quote: Aspiration is the wings of the soul.
29.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

30.quote: Aspire daily to be more loving, more peaceful, more attuned to God.
30.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

1.quote: The higher your aspiration, the greater your spiritual achievement.
1.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

2.quote: Without enthusiasm, the greatest goals remain unachieved.
2.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

3.quote: Enthusiasm is the spark that ignites the fire of achievement.
3.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

4.quote: Approach every task with enthusiasm — it is a sign of spiritual vitality.
4.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

6.quote: Let your enthusiasm for God be the driving force of your life.
6.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

7.quote: Enthusiasm is contagious. Spread it wherever you go.
7.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

8.quote: An enthusiastic spirit transforms drudgery into delight.
8.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

10.quote: Be content with what you have, while working for what you want.
10.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

11.quote: True contentment comes from within — from the peace of the soul.
11.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

12.quote: He who is content with little has everything.
12.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

13.quote: Contentment is not complacency; it is peace while pursuing progress.
13.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

14.quote: Find contentment in the present moment — it is all you truly have.
14.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

15.quote: The contented soul is like a calm lake — nothing can disturb its peace.
15.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

16.quote: Renunciation does not mean giving up the world; it means giving up worldly attachment.
16.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

17.quote: True renunciation is the inner letting go of all that binds the soul.
17.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

18.quote: Renounce the desire for the fruits of action, but never renounce action itself.
18.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

19.quote: The renunciant lives in the world but is not of the world.
19.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

20.quote: Inner renunciation leads to outer freedom.
20.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

21.quote: Renunciation is not loss; it is the exchange of the lesser for the greater.
21.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

22.quote: He who renounces all for God gains all.
22.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

23.quote: God is nearer to you than you are to yourself.
23.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

24.quote: In every atom, in every breath, God's presence permeates all.
24.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

25.quote: When you feel God's presence, all fear and sorrow disappear.
25.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

26.quote: The awareness of God's presence is the greatest blessing of human life.
26.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

27.quote: God is not distant. He is the very essence of your being.
27.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

28.quote: Practice the presence of God in every moment of your life.
28.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

29.quote: In the silence of your heart, God speaks. Be still and listen.
29.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

30.quote: It is usually more or less easy to analyze others and classify them according to personality. But the most important analysis is that of yourself.
30.author: Paramahansa Yogananda

31.quote: Introspection is a mirror in which to see recesses of your mind that otherwise would not be accessible to you.
31.author: Paramahansa Yogananda
